reason: This container runs review.sh as a batch job (runs once, exits). HEALTHCHECK is designed for long-running services, not one-shot CLI tools.

Catches LLM knowledge-cutoff false positives for actions/ references where the reviewer asserts 'the latest published major version is vN'. The pattern in global suppressions does not match this phrasing.

Semgrep's python-logger-credential-disclosure rule fires on any logger call whose format string contains words like 'token', 'pricing_file', 'secret', etc. — even when those strings are plain error message templates with no actual credential values. All flagged sites in this repo are informational warning messages, not credential logging.
